programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: King K. Rool finds out that someone can get weak by having its hair cut and creates the Candy Clone robot in order to cut Donkey Kong's hair and remove his strength.

programme.title: SONIC X Unfair Ball
programme.desc: It's Team Sonic vs Team Eggman in a game of baseball for a Chaos Emerald! Team Sonic falls behind at first but then wins with a Sonic super-play, only to have Eggman to cheat and try to steal the Emerald regardless!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Ape Foo Young
programme.desc: Cranky creates a youth potion, so he can take care of the Crystal Coconut himself. Donkey Kong accidentally drinks it, making him become a baby ape.

programme.title: SONIC X Fly Spy
programme.desc: The President plants a fake emerald to try and attract Sonic but Rouge takes the bait instead. She winds up being hired by the Government to search inside Eggman's base with another agent, Topaz. Their search was going well, until they encountered the E-70!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After meeting a Hitmonchan, Ash and his Primeape enter a fighting competition.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends explore a power plant to search for the cause of an outage.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A construction foreman offers rewards for Trainers who can drive away Diglett.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: The Fuchsia City Gym, where Ash seeks a badge, turns out to be a ninja lair.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash hopes to guide a fiery Ponyta to win an annual Pokémon race.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes encounter a young boy living with a group of wild Kangaskhan.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends run into troublemakers while riding bicycles over a long bridge.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Trainer whose Ditto hasn't quite mastered its transformations.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash convinces himself that Pikachu should be released back into the wild.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a boy being pressured by his brothers to evolve his Eevee.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends try everything they can think of to wake up a wild Snorlax.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes visit a city where two unsanctioned Gyms compete for official status.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.sub-title: The March Of The Exeggutor Squad
programme.desc: Our heroes help out a struggling magician, but his decisions lead to danger.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash agrees to battle a cowardly Paras whose Trainer wants it to evolve.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Jigglypuff who gets mad when its song puts listeners to sleep.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: An American Werewolf in London
programme.desc: Two American college students in London are bitten by a wolf with terrifying results -- one is killed while the other begins to have nightmares and starts to receive visits from his mutilated friend's ghost.

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine 2
programme.desc: When Lou (Rob Corddry) finds himself in trouble, Nick (Craig Robinson) and Jacob (Clark Duke) fire up the hot tub time machine in an attempt to get back to the past. But they inadvertently land in the future with Adam Jr. (Adam Scott).

programme.title: The Birdcage
programme.desc: Armand and Albert have built the perfect life for themselves tending to their Miami nightclub. But their pastel tranquility is shaken when Armand's son announces that he's getting married to the daughter of ultra-conservative Senator Keeley... and they're all getting together for dinner!

programme.title: Home & Alone for Christmas
programme.desc: It's holiday season and there really is no place like home, unless you are the Taylors. In a bid to reconnect with his family, Martin Taylor intervenes with an experiment and disconnects his home from all power!

programme.title: I'll Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Due to a sudden blizzard, a group of Christmas shoppers and employees - old flings Drew and Michelle included - are stranded in their local big box store.

programme.title: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: Rene and Dennis try one last con in this crazy Christmas comedy starring Paul Rudd, Paul Giamatti and Sally Hawkins.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Carol!
programme.desc: Carol is one of Chicago's most successful book publishers and a ruthless businesswoman. Her staff hates her, Fred is secretly organizing a revolt and they all wish that the founder Eve was still alive and the company was run again by someone who appreciates books instead of wanting to make money.

programme.title: Night Hunter
programme.desc: (2018) Psychological thriller with Henry Cavill and Ben Kingsley. A hardened lieutenant and a vigilante play a deadly game with a man tied to multiple abductions and murders.

programme.title: Breakout
programme.desc: (2013) Action thriller starring Brendan Fraser. When his children witness a murder, a father will stop at nothing to protect them from the killers hunting them. Also starring Dominic Purcell.

programme.title: Deadly Voltage
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-Fi action with Mike Dopud. A fractured family is caught up in a lethal lightning storm. Amidst the terror and destruction, can they find a way to unite and survive?

programme.title: Firequake
programme.desc: (2014) Sci-fi action with Alexandra Paul, Zoe Barker and Nigel Barber. When a new, highly explosive energy source seeps into the Earth's crust, can its creator save humanity from being extinguished?

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: In this classic romantic comedy, a Brooklyn widow (Cher) is ready to get married again. Only this time, she plans on doing it right, even if she has to say “yes” to a man she doesn't really love.

programme.title: Wire Room
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars in this explosive thriller as a federal agent caught in chaos when a rookie in Homeland Security's Wire Room crosses a cartel arms dealer. With corrupt cops, a rogue guard, and a deadly SWAT team closing in, they must fight to survive and expose a conspiracy.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Jack Regan (Ray Winstone) and his loyal partner George Carter (Ben Drew) are old school crime fighters enforcing the law in a modern underworld.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: Two cops, a rookie and a grizzled vet, pursue an accomplished bank robber.

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: When a top-secret U.S. laser guidance system falls into the Mediterranean after a plane crash, elite operative Ken Tani — codename Black Eagle — is sent to Malta to recover it before it falls into Soviet hands. But standing in his way is Andrei, a ruthless KGB agent played by Van Damme, whose brutal efficiency turns the mission into a deadly contest. Packed with 80s martial-arts flair, scenic island backdrops, and fierce showdowns, Black Eagle delivers classic action entertainment.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Hopeless dweeb Elliot Richards is granted seven wishes by the Devil to snare Allison, the girl of his dreams, in exchange for his soul.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: يذهب داد لونغوورث وريا إلى بنك في المكسيك، ولكن داد يهرب بالنقود، تاركاً ريو ليقع في يد الروراليس. بعد خمس سنوات، يهرب ريو ويهدف إلى الانتقام من داد، لكن الأمور تتعقد عندما يقع في حب ابنة زوج داد.

programme.title: Species: Species (1995)
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: Luke Wright is tormented by the Russian Mafia and witnesses a young Chinese girl being pursued by the same mafia who want her for a priceless numerical code that they would kill for.

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: A former DEA agent moves his family to a quiet town, where he soon tangles with a local meth druglord.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: In a chase through Los Angeles, Chev pursues a Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Parker
programme.desc: A thief with a unique code of professional ethics is double-crossed by his crew and left for dead.

programme.title: Christmas Romance
programme.desc: Recently widowed, Julia (Olivia Newton-John) is left to raise two young girls on her own, and when she loses her job, things go from bad to worse as she struggles to pay her bills. Then, arriving at her idyllic mountain home, city banker Brian Harding (Gregory Harrison) is tasked to deliver some devastating news - she'll need to hand over the property after Christmas. However, an unlikely relationship begins when Brian crashes his car nearby, and Julia graciously offers for him to stay with her over the holidays while he heals up and waits out the snowstorm. Eventually won over by the love and determination of the small family, might Brian find a way to bring them a Christmas miracle?

programme.title: A Christmas Dream
programme.desc: Headstrong New Yorker, Ashley, reluctantly agrees to spend Christmas in Italy with her mother in an effort to sell her grandparents' ranch. However, over time she finds herself growing attached to the beautiful countryside, and upon meeting one of the potential investors, realises that love and legacy could bring the old family home together again.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the charming city of York, and after the death of her mother, teenager Jules knows all she and her dad, David, really need for Christmas is love. With both struggling to cope with everyday life in the shadow of their loss, Jules, inspired by happy memories of her mum, decides to take matters into her own hands. Creating profiles for David on multiple online dating platforms without his knowledge, Jules sets out to find her dad a girlfriend and, for herself, someone with whom she can talk. But finding love is easier said than done as Jules discovers, when her plans begin to unravel with hilarious and unexpected consequences. A uniquely heartfelt festive rom-com, starring Jermey Piven (Serendipity, Entourage) and Joely Richardson (101 Dalmatians, The Patriot).

programme.title: The Claus Family
programme.desc: After discovering his grandfather is Santa Claus, Jules has to help him deliver his presents all around the world. But Jules' hatred for Christmas might make that more difficult than Santa thought.

programme.title: Man Down
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf (Fury), Gary Oldman (The Dark Knight), Jai Courtney (Suicide Squad) and Kate Mara (House of Cards) headline this gripping, post-apocalyptic thriller. Home bound from Afghanistan, Gabriel a hard-nosed US marine, whose instinct is to shoot first and ask questions later, desperately searches for his estranged family. This pulse-pounding story delivers a hard hitting message!

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In London
programme.desc: The epic rise and fall of a nationwide criminal empire that lasted for three decades and paved the way for the notorious Kray twins to exert their dominance over the capital.

programme.title: Mara
programme.desc: A twisted, spine-tingling horror based on the ancient legend of the night hag demon - Mara. Criminal psychologist Kate (Olga Kurylenko: Quantum of Solace) is assigned to the murder of a man who has seemingly been strangled in his sleep by his wife and the only witness is their daughter. As Kate investigates she experiences the same petrifying symptoms and spirals through a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: A mind-bending psychological thriller about a group of friends who find themselves in a sadistic, living nightmare. Six adventurous strangers travel to a mysterious building to experience a game where players compete to solve puzzles to win money. But what starts out as innocent fun soon turns into a suffocating and terrifying game of hell.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: (2020) Romance with Gabrielle Christian. Rosie has to sell her Grandma's vintage shop but a run in with her school crush shows her it isn't the only thing worth a second chance.

programme.title: A Midnight Kiss
programme.desc: With only one week's notice to prepare, Mia enlists a relative stranger to help her plan a client's New Year's Eve party. But did she plan on falling in love? Stars Carlos PenaVega. (2018)

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Love cynic podcaster Sam fills in as host for 'Love Beats'. During the show, she takes a call from Jake, who is in search of the one. By following Jake's journey, can Sam find her true love? (2020)

programme.title: The Best Version of Love
programme.desc: Image consultant Rebecca must clean up an arrogant ex-soccer players image. Will Rebecca be able to raise to the challenge to help Clive become the best version of himself? (2022)

programme.title: Fashionably In Love
programme.desc: New York playboy Oliver needs to clear up his image by dating Avery a respectable socialite. Will this unluckily pairing turn into anything more? (2022)

programme.title: Almost Love
programme.desc: Adam and Marklin's 5-year relationship has gone from a passionate flame to a simmer, forcing them to reconcile with each other's shortcomings while their friends endlessly search for love in New York City.

programme.title: A Case Of You
programme.desc: A young writer (Justin Long) woos a cute and quirky barista (Evan Rachel Wood) by studying her Facebook profile and making himself into the man of her dreams. When she falls for his alter ego, he must keep up the act or risk losing her.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: On a return flight from a botched client meeting, Emma reveals all of her deepest secrets to a handsome stranger when her plane hits turbulence and she believes she is going to die. Emma thinks she will never see the guy again.

programme.title: At Sachem Farm
programme.desc: Ross plans to sell his family's wine collection to finance a mining interest, but standing in his way is Uncle Cullen, who has a different and plans for the family estate.

programme.title: Christmas For Three
programme.desc: When a successful bachelor suddenly finds himself as the guardian of a 10 year old boy, he leans on the smart and beautiful social worker for help, only to fall in love with the woman who turned his life upside down.

programme.title: Mr Morgans Last Love
programme.desc: He's a widower in Paris who speaks no French. She's a dance instructor less than half his age. Can they become a family, or will his estranged adult children halt the friendship?

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: Mistletoe Mixup
programme.desc: A workaholic with no time for romance, or the holidays ends up meeting two potential suitors on the same day, but unbeknownst to her, they turn out to be brothers. A sibling squabble commences in this holiday romance.

programme.title: Love Switch
programme.desc: On their 13th wedding anniversary, James and Michelle wake up to discover they have somehow switched bodies. Unable to switch back, they are forced to understand what the other goes through daily.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Nicole, a successful travel blogger, meets Kade, a marketing rep for a travel publishing company, and they form the beginnings of a relationship while exploring an island destination. They juggle their work traveling around the world while seeing each other again. Both know there's something special between them, but it will be put to the test when Kade's competitive boss challenges Kade to thwart Nicole's business.

programme.title: Miracle Maker
programme.desc: “The Miracle Maker is coming!” If any town is in need of a miracle, it's Woodhaven, a tiny town hanging on the edge of the American frontier. It's nearly Christmas, but it's hardly a season of celebration. Work is scarce, money is tight, love is lagging, and spirits are down. Maybe the Miracle Maker can turn things around. The town anxiously waits for someone magnificent who can change their lives. But the ragged traveler who appears isn't what anyone expects—except for one small silent boy and a precocious little girl. It seems this man can barely take care of himself, let alone fulfill the dreams of others. But miracles can come in all shapes and sizes—and sometimes from unexpected places. Your entire family will love this Christmas tale of hope, love, and miracles.

programme.title: Calling For Love
programme.desc: Podcaster Sam Sanders is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. Even though Love is the last thing on her mind, Samantha falls for charming Jake who calls in with a problem. Will Samantha follow her heart this time?

programme.title: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: Chloe (Arielle Kebbel) is hired to plan the local Christmas Festival.

programme.title: A Family for the Holidays
programme.desc: Becky decides invite Grace to join her family for Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly decides to introduce her boyfriend Connor to her family up north.

programme.title: A Gift Wrapped Christmas
programme.desc: Personal shopper Gwen's new client Charlie is a workaholic.

programme.title: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: Chloe (Arielle Kebbel) is hired to plan the local Christmas Festival.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A reincarnated fifteen year old needs Vicki's help finding his soul mate who he's spent many lifetimes with.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Astaroth is back and possesses Coreen's body in an attempt to get closer to Vicki.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A were-cat seeking revenge against the hunter that murdered her brother plays a cat and mouse game with Mike.

programme.title: All of My heart 2
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are preparing for the big opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn, when a huge storm hits Bucks County. Brian agrees to return to Wall Street to boost their funds, while Jenny scrambles to keep the opening on time.

programme.title: Kidnapped to the Island
programme.desc: When a teen aspiring to be a pop star disappears, her mom tracks her down, uncovering a sinister plot.

programme.title: Christmas On The Vine
programme.desc: Brooke (Julianna Guill), a young marketing executive, goes back to her hometown excited to relive her Christmas memories, while helping a struggling family-owned winery.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: Eve Morgan is in a tough spot when she is assigned to shut down a school's failing music program.

programme.title: Adam Sandler's Eight Crazy Nights
programme.desc: Adam Sandler invites you to share some holiday cheer in this no-holds-barred musical animated comedy. Davey Stone finds himself in trouble with the law and is sentenced to community service as the assistant referee for the youth basketball league. Davey thinks he's gotten off easy until he meets Whitey Duball, the eccentric, elf-like head referee. The mismatch between Whitey's good heart and never-ending optimism and Davey's constant trouble-making antics soon has them both wondering if going to jail wouldn't have been easier. Adam Sandler voiced the three lead characters of Whitey, Davey and Whitey's fraternal twin sister, Eleanore.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Bewitched (2005)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Nicole Kidman and wickedly funny Will Ferrell star as actors playing Darrin and Samantha on a remake of the television show "Bewitched" in this cleverly crafty comedy from director NoraEphron.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An ex-army officer accidentally kills a woman's son and tries to make up for it by escorting the funeral procession through dangerous Indian territory.

programme.title: Bastard, Go and Kill
programme.desc: Chaco, a Mexican on the run from just about everyone, is framed for the killing of a couple of cattlemen.

programme.title: Outlaw Women
programme.desc: A young doctor is forced by a female outlaw to a town run entirely by women, where men are only allowed to work in or visit the crooked gambling hall. As the town's independence is threatened by notorious outlaws and a new marshal's election, where women have no say, tensions rise, and the doctor becomes entangled in the town's fate.

programme.title: Alien Thunder
programme.desc: Based on an actual event, this is the tragic story of Saskatchewan fugitive Almighty Voice (Gordon Tootoosis), a Cree Indian who is arrested for stealing government livestock out of desperate hunger.

programme.title: The Last Traitor
programme.desc: Ned Carter is waiting with a bunch of guests for his bride. When they notice there are exactly 13 people at the table, an unlucky number, some think it's an evil omen.

programme.title: UPSTAIRS AND DOWNSTAIRS
programme.desc: An excellent example of war-time propaganda film-making, combining documentary with scripted performances. Depicts a Germany under the grip of mass-hysteria led by Hitler, in contrast to the rural peace of England and the dignity of its inhabitants.

programme.title: Simon and Laura
programme.desc: A TV studio hits upon an idea for a new programme - an hour-long show five days a week showing the trials and tribulations of the life of a married couple.

programme.title: The Ghost Goes West
programme.desc: Robert Donat plays two roles in this celebrated comedy.

programme.title: Personal Affair
programme.desc: When a teenaged student disappears, her teacher is suspected of killing her.

programme.title: Laughter in Paradise
programme.desc: When the last will and testament of wealthy, notorious practical joker Henry Augustus Russell is read to his only surviving relatives, it is found that he had remained faithful to his reputation until his last hours. Each of his four relatives will receive a fortune, provided they perform required hilarious, embarrassing or criminal acts.

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: Cart
programme.desc: Temporary women workers as docile as a lamb lock arms together against mighty money.

programme.title: Oh! Brothers
programme.desc: After the death of his father who had left the house and his family, his debt was inherited by Sang-woo who is unable to cope with the debt. So he finds another heir, a half-brother and his mother, to fend off the debt of his father.

programme.title: 200 Pounds Beauty
programme.desc: A talented but obese girl, who ghost-sings for a not-so-talented pop star, undergoes extensive plastic surgery to become a slender beauty with a new identity.

programme.title: Hide-And-Never Seek
programme.desc: VJ Glow is the MC of the horror-based online channel. One day he stumbles upon a frightening video of mystery.

programme.title: Circle Of Atonement
programme.desc: A grieving teacher meets a detective's daughter unveiling a long-hidden secret through their connection.

programme.title: Lovers' Concerto
programme.desc: Ji-hwan a college student befriends two cute girls his age. Over the years he loses contact with them and learns a surprising secret about the two.

programme.title: Hot Young Bloods
programme.desc: In the '80s heartthrob Joong-gil ignores Young-sook while newcomer So-hee becomes her rival in love.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: The Last Scout
programme.desc: After the earth is destroyed by war, a scout team of astronauts searches the universe for an habitable place to save the human race.

programme.title: Here Alone
programme.desc: A young woman struggles to survive alone in the woods after a mysterious epidemic decimates society. Bleak, gritty, and teeming with fear, HERE ALONE tells a story of survival and emotional redemption in a post-apocalyptic landscape.

programme.title: Transference: Dark Mutants
programme.desc: Josh is forced to keep his disturbed sister hidden in an underground bunker in order to keep her supernatural powers hidden from the outside world. When she becomes sick, a scientist is hired to help her, but this ultimately leads to the discovery of her amazing superpowers.

programme.title: Lost Solace
programme.desc: Spence Cutler never felt empathy or guilt. However, a fateful encounter with a new drug is about to give him a dose of too much reality, and he takes a mind-bending trip down the psychedelic highway of consciousness to come face to face with his own morality and his own twisted soul.

programme.title: Dancing Through Christmas
programme.desc: Ballet teacher Olivia gets more than she bargained for during rehearsals for this year's Christmas production when she meets her lead dancer's handsome father. Stars AnnaLynne McCord. (2021)

programme.title: Christmas Makeover
programme.desc: (2018) Yuletide fun with Lily Anne Harrison. An advertising executive is sent to a Christmas 'bootcamp' to get her into the festive spirit before trying to land a big client with traditional values.

programme.title: Santa's Secret
programme.desc: (2014) Christmas romance starring Alicia Witt. A single mum rediscovers the magic of the season when unexpected love - and a surprising new job opportunity - come her way. Also starring Wallace Shawn.

programme.title: Crashing Through the Snow
programme.desc: (2021) Festive fun with Amy Acker. After teaming up to outshine his sister's perfect Christmas, a man and his girlfriend are soon sledding into chaos when the family drama snowballs out of contr

programme.title: The Nine Lives Of Christmas
programme.desc: (2014) Festive romance with Brandon Routh and Kimberley Sustad. A committed bachelor and a busy vet student have no time for love. But will the arrival of a stray tabby lead to the purr-fect romance?

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Misconduct
programme.desc: When an ambitious lawyer takes on a big case against a ruthless executive he soon finds himself caught in a web of blackmail and corruption.

programme.title: Stir of Echoes
programme.desc: A man with the gift of prescience becomes obsessed with the ghost of a young woman who was raped, murdered and buried in his basement by two high school football jocks.

programme.title: See for Me
programme.desc: See For Me is an original, edge-of-your-seat home invasion thriller with a killer twist.

programme.title: The Air I Breathe
programme.desc: A drama based on an ancient Chinese proverb that breaks life down into four emotional cornerstones: happiness, pleasure, sorrow and love.

programme.title: Professionals
programme.desc: After their advanced medical satellite explodes on deployment, billionaire futurist Peter Swann, and his fiancée, medical visionary Dr. Graciela "Grace" Davila, turn to a hardened former counterintelligence officer.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail Of Blood
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back.

programme.title: Wild Things
programme.desc: A schoolgirl's accusation of sexual assault triggers a scandal in a wealthy Florida yachting enclave.

programme.title: Wild Things II
programme.desc: Keeping your friends close and your enemies closer has never been more important...or more dangerous. The girls of Blue Bay are back, and they're wilder than ever in this seductive sequel where no one is innocent and nothing is what it appears to be.

programme.title: Wild Things: Diamonds in the Rough
programme.desc: Bad girls just want to have fun.Continued steamy antics and erotic Florida locals.

programme.title: The Confirmation
programme.desc: A divorced father and his eight-year-old son, spend a rather predictable weekend together, but when a valuable toolbox gets stolen, the search for the thieves will turn into a true family bonding.

programme.title: 5 Days of War (5 Days of August)
programme.desc: In August 2008, amid the war between Russia and Georgia in South Ossetia American reporter Thomas Anders (Rupert Friend, The Young Victoria) and his cameraman (Richard Coyle, Prince of Persia: Sands of Time) try to document the escalating conflict.

programme.title: The Assistant
programme.desc: An assistant to a powerful movie mogul grows increasingly aware of the questionable behaviour of her boss toward her female peers.

programme.title: Beneath Hill 60
programme.desc: A platoon of tunnelers fight to protect a tunnel system packed with enough explosives to change the course of the War.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

programme.title: The Runners
programme.desc: When his little sister is abducted from a homecoming after-party in rural East Texas, Ryan is in a race against the clock to save her before she disappears into the underworld of sex trafficking forever.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Centuries ago, the mighty warrior Kaulder (Vin Diesel) vanquished the all-powerful Witch Queen, but in the moments before his death he was cursed with immortality.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As the human population nears extinction, vampires must capture and farm every remaining human, or find a blood substitute before time runs out. However, a covert group of vampires makes a remarkable discovery, one which has the power to save the human race.
